# Decision Log

## Purpose
This document records material decisions affecting architecture, delivery approach, controls, operating model, integrations, or cutover strategy.

## Guidance for completion
Capture decisions that are significant enough to affect implementation, governance, support, or audit response. Include the rationale so future reviewers understand why the decision was made.

| Decision ID | Date | Topic | Decision | Rationale | Approved By | Impacted Areas | Linked Docs |
